name: gogcli-mcp-gmail
description: Extended Gmail for Claude via gogcli — auth + full Gmail support (threads, labels, drafts, attachments, forward, autoreply, bulk operations)

gog_account.title: Google Account
gog_account.description: Default Google account email (optional — uses gogcli's configured default if omitted)

gog_path.title: gog Executable Path
gog_path.description: Path to the gog executable (optional — defaults to 'gog' on your PATH)

tools.name: gog_auth_add
tools.description: Authorize a Google account via browser-based OAuth

tools.name: gog_auth_list
tools.description: List all Google accounts stored in gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_status
tools.description: Show gogcli auth configuration

tools.name: gog_auth_services
tools.description: List Google services and OAuth scopes supported by gogcli

tools.name: gog_auth_run
tools.description: Run any gog auth subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_gmail_search
tools.description: Search Gmail threads using Gmail query syntax

tools.name: gog_gmail_get
tools.description: Get a Gmail message by ID

tools.name: gog_gmail_send
tools.description: Send an email

tools.name: gog_gmail_run
tools.description: Run any gog gmail subcommand (escape hatch)

tools.name: gog_gmail_raw
tools.description: Dump raw Gmail API JSON for a message

tools.name: gog_gmail_attachment
tools.description: Download a single attachment from a message

tools.name: gog_gmail_url
tools.description: Print Gmail web URLs for one or more threads

tools.name: gog_gmail_history
tools.description: List Gmail history events since a historyId

tools.name: gog_gmail_archive
tools.description: Archive messages by IDs or by query

tools.name: gog_gmail_mark_read
tools.description: Mark messages as read by IDs or by query

tools.name: gog_gmail_mark_unread
tools.description: Mark messages as unread by IDs or by query

tools.name: gog_gmail_trash
tools.description: Move messages to trash by IDs or by query

tools.name: gog_gmail_message_modify
tools.description: Modify labels on a single message

tools.name: gog_gmail_batch_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete multiple messages (irreversible)

tools.name: gog_gmail_batch_modify
tools.description: Modify labels on multiple messages at once

tools.name: gog_gmail_thread_get
tools.description: Get a thread with all messages

tools.name: gog_gmail_thread_modify
tools.description: Modify labels on all messages in a thread

tools.name: gog_gmail_thread_attachments
tools.description: List or download all attachments in a thread

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_list
tools.description: List all Gmail labels

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_get
tools.description: Get label details and counts

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_create
tools.description: Create a new Gmail label

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_rename
tools.description: Rename a Gmail label

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_delete
tools.description: Delete a Gmail label

tools.name: gog_gmail_labels_modify
tools.description: Modify labels on one or more threads

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_list
tools.description: List Gmail drafts

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_get
tools.description: Get a Gmail draft by ID

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_create
tools.description: Create a new Gmail draft

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_update
tools.description: Update an existing Gmail draft

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_delete
tools.description: Delete a Gmail draft

tools.name: gog_gmail_drafts_send
tools.description: Send an existing Gmail draft

tools.name: gog_gmail_forward
tools.description: Forward a Gmail message to new recipients

tools.name: gog_gmail_autoreply
tools.description: Reply once to all messages matching a Gmail search query
